use_cases: Landing page hero section decorative background with animated leaves
Product showcase page visual enhancement with radial leaf patterns
Marketing site hero decoration to add visual interest
Decorative animated background for SaaS landing pages
Visual effect component for media and entertainment websites
ai_summary: An animated decorative component featuring radial leaf patterns arranged in concentric rings. Uses SVG filters with blur and saturation effects, along with a pink primary color (#ee75d2) to create a luminous, gradient-like appearance. Leaves are positioned radially with staggered animation delays for a cascading entrance effect, making it ideal as a hero background or decorative visual element for SaaS, media, or e-commerce platforms.
